AI Carbon Monitor

AI Carbon Tracking
and Optimization

Track, analyze, and optimize the energy consumption of your machine learning models with our advanced monitoring solution.

🌱

Eco-Friendly AI

Visualize exact CO2 emissions generated by your training and inference workloads.

⚡

Real-Time Stats

Live updates on CPU, GPU, and Memory power consumption with minimal overhead.

💡

Smart Suggestions

Get actionable insights on how to reduce your carbon footprint and optimize efficiency.

Supported Workloads

Fully Runnable

Dummy Workload

  • No real training involved
  • Just CPU computation
  • Used for testing pipeline
  • Safe on any system
Highly Recommended

LSTM (Time-Series)

  • Best model for demo
  • Lightweight & Fast
  • Runs efficiently on CPU
  • Text & Time-series data
Limited Resources

ResNet (CNN)

  • Supports ResNet18 / 34
  • CIFAR-10 / Custom images
  • Visualizes GPU impact
  • Shows higher CO₂ profile

System Requirements

Core Software

  • Python 3.9+
  • Node.js 16+
  • Git Latest

AI Frameworks

  • PyTorch 2.0+
  • CodeCarbon 2.3+
  • FastAPI 0.10+
© 2024 AI Carbon Tracking and Optimization. Built for a sustainable future.
); }; export default LandingPage;
